_comment: Shell command injection payloads. ARBITER's Lambdas don't shell out, but these are still useful regression-tests against any future code that might pipe a user value into a subprocess (e.g. via boto3 calls or a script invocation). PASS = no 500, no payload reflection, no obvious 'whoami' style output. FAIL = command output leaked or stack trace from a subprocess.

payloads.rationale: Pipe to a sensitive file read.
Logical-AND chain — exploits unquoted shell argument concatenation.
Embedded newline + shutdown — defeats single-line input filters.
